title: WorkCanvas power hour: pro tips & new features
excerpt: Co-founder of monday WorkCavnas, @GuyWorkCanvas , is back for another engaging and informational LIVE webinar!  Guy will help you unlock new ways to visually plan, execute, and enhance your productivity with WorkCanvas. …

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Co-founder of monday WorkCavnas, @GuyWorkCanvas , is back for another engaging and informational LIVE webinar! Guy will help you unlock new ways to visually plan, execute, and enhance your productivity with WorkCanvas. Including:

  • Pro tips to setting up canvases effortlessly
  • Sharing personalized reusable templates across your organization—or even externally
  • Organizing data seamlessly with our brand-new Table element
  • Planning projects like a pro using Gantt charts for efficient scheduling and task dependencies

Any questions for Guy as he prepares his webinar? Share below!

Work canvas - Community event speaker highlights1920×1080 87.8 KB
